rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"Aerodrome Slipstream is a Uniswap V3 fork with gauge integrationThe core AMM math is identical to Uniswap V3, so we reuse the same librariesDoes NOT implement deposit/withdrawal quotes (Slipstream uses NFT positions)Assumes swaps stay within current tick (no tick crossing)Supports unstaked fee: Slipstream pools charge an additional fee on swaps against unstaked liquidity.      Use the overloads with `unstakedFeePips` parameter when quoting for unstaked positions.      Total fee = pool.fee() + pool.unstakedFee() for unstaked positions.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"FEE_DENOMINATOR":{"details":"Fee denominator (1,000,000 for pips precision)"}},"title":"SlipstreamUtils","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Math utilities for quoting Aerodrome Slipstream (CL) swaps within a single
